subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Sacred Threshold! Your detailed letter dated 14th January 1920 hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان آستان مقدس نامه مفصل شما که بتاریخ ۱۴ کانون ثانی ۱۹۲۰ بود رسید از
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @unity; oneness of humanity, @eulogies; reminiscences, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
